context: Tests role-based authorization on privileged room actions. The skill requires that admin/host-only messages are guarded by verifying ownership before executing — any client must not be able to trigger startMatch or kickPlayer without being the designated host.

checklist.name: Host assigned server-side
checklist.description: The host session is determined and stored by the server (e.g. first joiner's sessionId in onJoin or onCreate) — not provided by the client as a payload field

checklist.name: Host set on first join
checklist.description: The host is assigned when the first player joins (onCreate options or first onJoin call)

checklist.name: startMatch guard
checklist.description: startMatch handler checks client.sessionId against the stored host ID and returns early if not the host

checklist.name: kickPlayer guard
checklist.description: kickPlayer handler checks client.sessionId against the stored host ID and returns early if not the host

checklist.name: Target from payload
checklist.description: kickPlayer uses payload.targetSessionId to identify the player to remove — not a client-supplied authority flag

checklist.name: Guard returns early
checklist.description: Both privileged handlers return (do nothing) when the caller is not the host — they do not throw or allow partial execution

checklist.name: All hooks present
checklist.description: Room implements onCreate, onJoin, onLeave, and onDispose
